case_title: RAMON MORELL VS. VICKERS CONCRETE SAWING,INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORELL, RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT VICKERS CONCRETE SAWING,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
